metadata_description: GrowthikOS is an enterprise AI-powered marketing platform for SEO, AI visibility, analytics, automation, reporting, and growth teams.
announcement: Build search, AI visibility, reporting, and automation in one GrowthikOS workspace.
hero_support_badge: Built for agencies, startups, and growth teams
hero_title: Make your business discoverable in search, AI, and beyond.
hero_description: GrowthikOS brings SEO, AI visibility, ads, CRM, automation, analytics, and reporting into one premium command center for modern marketing teams.
platform_title: Built for search and AI from the first project.
platform_description: Every account can manage multiple websites, teams, reports, campaigns, and automations. Each insight stays scoped to the right project so agencies can move fast without mixing client data.
ai_workflow_title: AI that creates results, not noise.
ai_workflow_description: GrowthikOS reads your website, search footprint, campaign data, and reporting history to recommend the work most likely to move pipeline.
modules_title: One project workspace for every growth channel.
dashboard_title: See every project signal without switching tools.
dashboard_description: Combine live KPIs, issue queues, AI recommendations, rankings, funnels, and report readiness in a workspace your team can scan.
agent_title: Your AI marketer for strategy, fixes, and execution.
agent_description: Ask what changed, what matters, and what should happen next. The agent turns project context into tasks, briefs, reports, and alerts.
results_title: Built to turn analysis into measurable growth.
use_cases_title: Whatever your role, GrowthikOS gives you an edge.
enterprise_description: Secure, scalable, and ready for teams that need client management, governance, white-label reporting, and API-first workflows.
community_title: Learn with marketers building the next growth stack.
community_description: Academy, templates, events, guides, webinars, and community channels help teams turn the platform into repeatable operating habits.
trusted_by: Trusted across growth teams and industries
final_title: Stay discoverable in search, AI, and beyond.
final_description: Start with a project, run the first audit, and let GrowthikOS shape the next work your team should ship.
